title: Prequalification of Building Contractors & Consultants - NMB Bank Tanzania
description: NMB Bank Plc invites applications for prequalification of building contractors and consultants. This appears to be a separate or re-advertisement of building contractor and consultant prequalification for NMB Bank's operations across Tanzania.

contact.name: Secretary, NMB Bank Plc Management Tender Committee
contact.address: NMB Head Office, Ohio/Ali Hassan Mwinyi Road, PO Box 9213, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania

eligibility: Based on historical prequalification requirements: Valid registration certificate, business license, certificate of incorporation, TIN, VAT registration. Minimum 3 years experience. Audited financial statements.
scrape_notes: Primary source (nmbbank.co.tz) blocked by Cloudflare. Tender found via mabumbe.net aggregator. Detail page paywalled. Closing date and full documents unavailable - recommend checking nmbbank.co.tz directly or contacting procurement@nmbtz.com. This may be related to NMB-2026-002 (re-advertisement or separate category).
